user_id.description: Reference to the visitor or buyer record in the Users table.

name.description: Full name of the buyer contact.

company.description: Company name of the overseas buyer.

country.description: Country or region where the buyer is based.

product_category.description: Main product category the buyer wants to source from China.

product_description.description: Description of the product, specifications, quality expectations, or reference details.

estimated_order_quantity.description: Expected order quantity, target MOQ, or annual purchasing volume.

target_market.description: Destination market or compliance region for the product.

services_needed.description: Sourcing support services requested by the buyer.

timeline.description: Buyer timeline for starting sourcing or placing an order.

message.description: Additional notes or questions from the buyer.

source_page.description: Website page where the inquiry was submitted.

submitted_at.description: Timestamp when the inquiry was submitted.
